scripts.dev: concurrently --names web,api "cd apps/web && npm run dev" "cd apps/api && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/web && npm run lint --workspace=apps/api
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=apps/web && npm run type-check --workspace=apps/api
